welcome_message_desc:
Hello {user}! Welcome to the official SyncInk support server.

Please read the rules and enjoy your stay.
error_no_permission: You do not have permission to perform this action.
error_generic: An unexpected error occurred. The developers have been notified.

success_feedback: Your feedback has been submitted successfully!
